label: Grammar rule
description: Base schema for raw grammar rule list items. The Class attribute selects the concrete rule subclass.

Class.label: Rule class
Class.description: C# Rule subclass used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this grammar rule item.

keyword.label: Keyword
keyword.description: The grammar symbol name this rule defines. Referenced in grammar strings as [keyword].

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Optional tag for categorizing or grouping rules.

requiredTag.label: Required tag
requiredTag.description: When set, this rule is only selected when the resolver has the specified tag active.

usesLimit.label: Uses limit
usesLimit.description: Maximum number of times this rule may fire during resolution. Null means unlimited.

constantConstraints.label: Constant constraints
constantConstraints.description: Key-value constraints that must be satisfied for this rule to fire.
